titles.title: Municipal Securities Rulemaking Board Reform Act of 2026
Municipal Securities Rulemaking Board Reform Act of 2026
A bill to amend the Securities Exchange Act of 1934 to clarify the composition of the membership of the Municipal Securities Rulemaking Board, and for other purposes.

action.text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs.

committee.name: Senate Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs
